name: agent-teams-control-plane
description: Optional hosted integration control-plane for Agent Teams.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/shared build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-config build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-logger build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/platform-api build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/features-system-health build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/api build && pnpm --filter @agent-teams-control-plane/worker build
scripts.verify:phase1: pnpm format:check && pnpm architecture:check && pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm worker:smoke && pnpm worker:smoke:dist && pnpm api:smoke && pnpm api:smoke:dist && pnpm config:hosted-failfast
